text:
is the bilingual version of the Attack on Titan manga, written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama, and translated by Sheldon Drzka.

This version, intended to teach natural English to a Japanese audience, features English speech bubbles (translated by Drzka), with the original Japanese written outside the panels.

The first two chapters of this bilingual edition were used in the reference book Attack on English, although with some minor variations.

Chapters and Volumes

The volumes use the same covers as the original series, but they have slightly more pages, managing to cover 20 chapters and 2 extra in 4 volumes. 
In the volumes' summaries, the chapters' titles are written in both Japanese and English.
